name: Qwen3.5-Omni-Flash
archDisplay: Thinker-Talker omnimodal architecture; both Thinker and Talker adopt Hybrid-Attention MoE; RVQ speech tokenizer (from Qwen3-Omni) plus ARIA (Adaptive Rate Interleave Alignment) text-speech interleaving in the Talker; exact parameter/expert configuration undisclosed
note: Smaller/faster tier of the Qwen3.5-Omni family (alongside Plus and a third 'Light' tier not in original leads); processes 10+ hours of audio and 400+ seconds of 720p audio-visual input at 1 FPS, with realtime speech generation. Notably released closed-weight, breaking Alibaba's open-weight streak for this class of model per press coverage.
